title: brachyscome ciliaris var. lyrifolia
intro: Brachyscome ciliaris var. lyrifolia, also known as the blue daisy or frost weed, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its bright blue daisy-like flowers and narrow, linear leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brachyscome ciliaris var. lyrifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
